sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 11.79 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.11)

statement.latex: Let$G$be a finite group of automorphisms of an infinite field$F$of characteristic‾$p$. Taking integral powers of the elements of$F$and the action of‾$G$define the action of the group ring${ Z}G$of$G$on the multiplicative group of‾$F$. Is it true that any subfield of$F$that contains the images of all elements of$F$under the action of some fixed element of${ Z}G p{ Z}G$contains infinitely many$G$-in...
